bachelor.title: Four years to
bachelor.description: 8 specialties in software development, cybersecurity, AI and mathematics. State-funded places, modern labs and industry-practitioner teachers.
bachelor.sliderSubtitle: From development to mathematics — choose a program that matches your goals and passions.
bachelor.admissionSubtitle: The entire process is online via EDBO. No queues or paperwork until enrollment.

nmtSubjects.subject: Elective subject (foreign language, physics, chemistry, etc.)

steps.title: Register for NMT
steps.text: Registration: March 5 – April 2 at my.testportal.gov.ua or through the Diia app. NMT results from 2023–2025 are also accepted.

steps.title: Take the NMT
steps.text: Mandatory subjects in 2026: Ukrainian language, mathematics, history of Ukraine. Additionally — one elective subject (foreign language, physics, chemistry, biology, etc.).

steps.title: Register in EDBO
steps.text: From July 1, the applicant's portal opens at vstup.edbo.gov.ua. Applications are submitted there, statuses are tracked, and enrollment choices are confirmed.

steps.title: Submit applications
steps.text: July 19 – August 1 (18:00). Maximum 10 applications total, no more than 5 — for state-funded places. Motivation letters are not required in 2026.

steps.title: Confirm your choice and receive enrollment
steps.text: By August 11 at 18:00 confirm your priority application in the EDBO portal. Enrollment order — August 13. State-funded — free, contract — based on agreement.

dates.label: NMT Registration
dates.note: my.testportal.gov.ua or through the Diia app

dates.label: NMT Examination
dates.note: Ukrainian language, mathematics, history of Ukraine — mandatory

dates.label: Application Submission
dates.note: Up to 10 applications, no more than 5 — for state-funded

dates.label: Enrollment
dates.note: Confirm your choice by August 11 at 18:00

bachelor.ctaSubtitle: The NNIKITI admissions committee will advise on choosing a specialty, documents and study conditions.

master.title: The next level
master.description: 1.5 years of advanced training in IT, AI and cybersecurity. Academic and professional master's programs with state-funded places available.
master.sliderSubtitle: 5 master's programs — from AI to cybersecurity and enterprise systems.
master.admissionSubtitle: The entire process takes no more than a month from registration to enrollment.

steps.title: Obtain a bachelor's degree
steps.text: A bachelor's or specialist diploma from any university is required. A junior bachelor's diploma does not entitle admission to a master's program.

steps.title: Register and take EVI and EFVV
steps.text: Registration: April 23 – May 14 at testportal.gov.ua. The unified entrance exam (EVI) = general academic competency test + foreign language. EFVV — professional exam in the chosen specialty.

steps.title: Wait for results
steps.text: Testing: June 26 – July 14. Results are published by July 23 in the portal at testportal.gov.ua.

steps.title: Submit applications via EDBO
steps.text: The applicant portal opens July 1 at vstup.edbo.gov.ua. Up to 5 applications for state-funded places. Motivation letters are not required in 2026.

steps.title: Competitive selection and enrollment
steps.text: Ranking: EVI score + EFVV score + diploma GPA. After the recommendation, confirm your choice in the portal and sign the agreement.

dates.label: EVI and EFVV Examinations
dates.note: General academic competency test + professional exam

dates.label: Exam Results
dates.note: Published in the personal portal at testportal.gov.ua

dates.label: Application Submission to EDBO
dates.note: vstup.edbo.gov.ua — up to 5 applications for state-funded places

dates.label: Master's Enrollment
dates.note: Rector's order; signing of the study agreement

master.tracksSubtitle: Choose your trajectory based on your goals — academic career or top position in an IT company.

tracks.title: Academic Master's
tracks.text: Publications in Scopus, participation in grant projects and preparation for PhD admission. Ideal for those aiming for a doctorate.

tracks.title: Professional Master's
tracks.text: Practical skills, corporate projects and mentorship from leading IT companies. For those who want to become industry leaders.

master.ctaSubtitle: NNIKITI Master's is not just a degree — it's a new level of thinking and opportunities. Contact the admissions committee.

postgraduate.title: The path to
postgraduate.description: A four-year research training program for those who aspire to become researchers, inventors or scientific leaders in IT and mathematics.
postgraduate.benefitsSubtitle: Postgraduate study is not just education. It's a scientific community, resources and international connections.

benefits.title: Scientific Publications
benefits.text: Support for publications in Scopus and Web of Science journals, participation in international conferences.

benefits.title: Academic Mobility
benefits.text: Internships at partner universities in Poland, Lithuania and the Czech Republic through Erasmus+.

benefits.title: Grant Programs
benefits.text: Support in finding funding through the Ministry of Education of Ukraine, Horizon Europe and bilateral programs.

benefits.title: Teaching Practice
benefits.text: Postgraduate students conduct practical classes and gain teaching experience under the guidance of mentors.

programs.name: Theory and Methods of Teaching
programs.description: Research in teaching methods for computer science and computing disciplines in higher education. Training of academic teaching staff.

programs.name: Computer Science (122)
programs.description: Algorithms, artificial intelligence, machine learning, big data and theoretical computer science. Publications in Scopus and WoS.

programs.name: Computer Engineering (123)
programs.description: Embedded systems, hardware security, FPGA and industrial automation. Collaboration with industrial partners.

programs.name: Applied Mathematics (113)
programs.description: Mathematical modeling, computational mathematics, optimization theory and statistical analysis of complex systems.

postgraduate.admissionSubtitle: Admission — annually in autumn. Contact with your future academic supervisor is recommended in advance.

steps.title: Choose an academic supervisor
steps.text: Contact the department to choose a research direction and agree on a dissertation topic with a potential academic supervisor.

steps.title: Prepare documents
steps.text: Master's diploma (or specialist diploma), list of publications (if any), essay on the chosen research topic and motivation letter.

steps.title: Take the entrance exam
steps.text: Centralized exam in research methodology — registration April 23 – May 14 at testportal.gov.ua, testing July 14–29. Results — by August 7.

steps.title: Competitive selection
steps.text: The ranking is formed from exam scores, master's diploma GPA and academic achievements (publications, patents, conferences).

steps.title: Enrollment and start of work
steps.text: After enrollment, development of an individual plan begins, the dissertation topic is approved and the first year of study starts.

dates.label: Exam Period
dates.note: Centralized exam at UCEQA testing centers

dates.label: Exam Results
dates.note: Published in the personal portal at testportal.gov.ua

dates.label: Application and Document Submission
dates.note: Master's diploma, list of publications, research topic essay

postgraduate.ctaSubtitle: Contact the NUWEE postgraduate office or directly the department to choose an academic supervisor and agree on a topic.

undergraduate.title: Professional junior
undergraduate.description: First step into IT — after grade 9 or 11. Get a junior specialist diploma in 2–3 years and continue bachelor's studies with a shortened term.
undergraduate.programsSubtitle: Three training programs — practical IT education valued by employers.

programs.name: Computer Science
programs.description: Programming fundamentals, algorithms, databases and web technologies. Ideal start for a future developer after grade 9 or 11.

programs.name: Computer Engineering
programs.description: Computer architecture, networks, embedded systems and hardware. We train engineers who understand computers from the inside.

programs.name: Information Systems and Technologies
programs.description: Design of corporate systems, 1C, ERP, digital document flow. A sought-after specialty in business and the public sector.

steps.title: Obtain your certificate
steps.text: Complete grade 9 or 11 and receive your basic secondary education certificate or general secondary education certificate.

steps.title: Register in EDBO
steps.text: Create an account in the Unified State Electronic Database on Education and submit your application online.

steps.title: Submit documents
steps.text: Upload scanned copies of your certificate, ID, medical form and photo. Originals are required after enrollment.

steps.title: Competitive selection
steps.text: Applicants are ranked by certificate GPA. For certain specialties an entrance test is required.

steps.title: Receive enrollment order
steps.text: After the enrollment order is issued, sign the agreement with the university and begin your studies.

undergraduate.datesSubtitle: Note the key dates so you don't miss anything.

dates.label: EDBO Registration
dates.note: For applicants after grade 9 — separate competition

dates.label: Document Submission
dates.note: Online through the applicant portal at vstup.osvita.ua

dates.label: Ranked Lists
dates.note: Published on the university website and in EDBO

dates.label: Enrollment Order
dates.note: Agreement must be signed within 3 business days

undergraduate.ctaTitle: Ready to take the first step?
undergraduate.ctaSubtitle: The NNIKITI admissions committee will answer all your questions. Leave an application — we will contact you.
